data.name: Sun City - Episode 2
data.detailed_description:
Languages


Join Discord!


關於此遊戲

After losing your family, you start living in another city, trying to hold on to life. In this city, you make new friends and engage in sexual relationships. You can experience different sequences by making choices. The story expands in the second episode of Sun City, and this episode has been developed with the UNITY game engine. All characters and locations used in the game are fictional. This game is intended for adults.

Sun City is a choice-focused, adult Visual Novel, and the first part includes:

Over 2200 static images and 20 animated scenes

Average playtime of 2 hours or more

An intriguing mystery

20 original songs

Episode 2

data.short_description: After losing your family, you struggle to survive and cling to life in another city. You make new friends and engage in sexual encounters. The story expands in the second installment of Sun City. All characters and locations used in the game are fictional. This game is intended for adults.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
